title: Join
description: Join Atlantis Dental Society and become part of our pre-dental community.

hero.headline: Join Atlantis Dental Society
hero.subheadline: If you are interested in becoming part of Atlantis Dental Society, we would love to hear from you.

sections.heading: What You Get as a Member
sections.body: Our community is designed to help students who are serious about dentistry connect with the support they need.

items.title: Exclusive Events
items.description: Access to workshops, panels, and networking sessions designed for pre-dental students.

items.title: Mentorship Access
items.description: Connect with mentors who can guide you on your path to dental school.

items.title: Resources & Guides
items.description: Curated materials to help you prepare academically and professionally.

items.title: Community & Support
items.description: Join a group of like-minded students who share your goals and aspirations.

sections.heading: Eligibility Note
sections.body: While students from different schools are welcome to engage with Atlantis Dental Society, only York University students are eligible to hold executive positions at this time. The application questions are a starting point and will be revised over time to better match the goals and growth of the society.
